exercises.title: VOICE AMP
exercises.brief: Trim, shout it in caps, slam an exclamation on the end.
promptLines: Define **shout(s)** that trims surrounding whitespace, converts the text to **upper case**, and appends a single `'!'`.

tests.name: basic phrase
tests.code: assertEqual(shout('wake up'), 'WAKE UP!', 'phrase should be upper-cased with !');

tests.name: trims edges
tests.code: assertEqual(shout('  neo '), 'NEO!', 'leading/trailing spaces must be trimmed');

tests.name: empty string
tests.code: assertEqual(shout(''), '!', 'empty input yields just the bang');

exercises.lore: In the construct, volume is a weapon. Crank it.

exercises.title: CRED MASK
exercises.brief: Hide a cred-stick number, leaving only the last four digits.
promptLines: Define **mask(card)** that returns the number with every character except the **last 4** replaced by `'*'`.
If the input is 4 characters or shorter, return it unchanged.
starterLines: // TODO: keep the last 4, replace the rest with '*'
exercises.lore: Flash the stick, not the balance. Last four only.

exercises.title: TOKEN TALLY
exercises.brief: Count the words in a transmission.
promptLines: Define **wordCount(s)** that returns how many space-separated words the string holds.
An empty or whitespace-only string must return `0`.
starterLines: // TODO: split on spaces and count, but handle the empty case
exercises.hint: Trim first; if it's '' return 0, else split(' ').length (drop empty chunks).
exercises.lore: Every token on the wire costs power. Count them.

exercises.title: SCREAM CASE
exercises.brief: Forge a screaming identifier from a list of words.
promptLines: Define **screamCase(words)** that upper-cases every word and joins them with an underscore `'_'`.
An empty array returns the empty string.
starterLines: // TODO: map each word to upper case, then join with '_'

exercises.title: SIGNAL SIEVE
exercises.brief: Keep only the long callsigns, drop the short noise.
promptLines: Define **longWords(words)** that returns a new array containing only the words whose length is **5 or more**.
Order is preserved; an empty array returns an empty array.
starterLines: // TODO: filter the array down to words of length >= 5
exercises.lore: Short bursts are static. The sieve keeps the long signals.
